testcase.name: NextAuth Debug Test › Test NextAuth Login with Debug Logs
testcase.system-out:
🔍 Testing NextAuth Login with Debug Logs... ✅ Login page loaded successfully ✅ Login form elements found ✅ Credentials filled ✅ Form submitted Current URL after login attempt: http://localhost:3000/login ❌ FAILED: Still on login page
📋 NextAuth Debug Logs:
testcase.system-err: (node:73289) Warning: The 'NO_COLOR' env is ignored due to the 'FORCE_COLOR' env being set. (Use `node --trace-warnings ...` to show where the warning was created)

testcase.name: NextAuth Debug Test › Test API Authentication Flow
testcase.system-out: 🔍 Testing API Authentication Flow... ✅ CSRF token obtained: 23a143ee1ab74ab6ed43... Signin response status: [33m200[39m Signin response headers: { vary: [32m'RSC, Next-Router-State-Tree, Next-Router-Prefetch, Next-Url, Accept-Encoding'[39m, [32m'cache-control'[39m: [32m'no-store, must-revalidate'[39m, [32m'x-powered-by'[39m: [32m'Next.js'[39m, [32m'content-type'[39m: [32m'text/html; charset=utf-8'[39m, [32m'content-encoding'[39m: [32m'gzip'[39m, date: [32m'Tue, 14 Oct 2025 05:42:59 GMT'[39m, connection: [32m'keep-alive'[39m, [32m'keep-alive'[39m: [32m'timeout=5'[39m, [32m'transfer-encoding'[39m: [32m'chunked'[39m }
testcase.system-err: (node:73290) Warning: The 'NO_COLOR' env is ignored due to the 'FORCE_COLOR' env being set. (Use `node --trace-warnings ...` to show where the warning was created)
